items.name: Family Platter for 6 people
items.description: Indulge in our delectable Family Kabob Platter, perfect for six! Enjoy your choice of 14 succulent kabobs, paired with fragrant Afghan rice, a fresh house salad with creamy lemon dressing, and our homemade spicy chutney. The platter also includes crispy fries and our signature tomato korma sauce, making it a delightful feast for the entire family.
